title: TacZSpigotHook
description: A mod that makes Tacz compatible with Spigot
body:
A Minecraft mod for hooking events of the Tacz mod to Spigot

In this way, your plugin can detect the damage caused by Tacz

(Currently, only damageevent has been hooked.

Other events may be updated later

It can only be used on physical servers or logical servers with Spigot (if you have used some mods that can add SpigotAPI to logical servers).

This is a public welfare project


一个我的世界mod，用以将Tacz模组的事件Hook到Spigot

这样你的插件就可以监听到Tacz造成的伤害了

（目前只Hook了damageevent）

后面可能会更新其他的事件

只能在具有Spigot的物理服务器或逻辑服务器上使用（如果你使用了一些可以为逻辑服务器增加SpigotAPI的模组的话）

这是一个公益项目
